title: FlashLead CRM
description: I helped build FlashLead from the ground up — a CRM that sales teams actually enjoy using. It brings together lead management, call tracking, and team communication into one clean experience across mobile and web.
highlights: Dashboard that gives sales reps a real-time snapshot of calls, leads, and meetings at a glance
Built-in internal chat so teams can respond to leads 3x faster without switching apps
Detailed lead interaction tracking — every call, note, and follow-up in one place
Cross-platform experience that feels native on both iOS and Android

title: Dukany
description: Dukany is all about empowering local retailers to go digital without the headache. I built the mobile app that lets shop owners manage their online store, send WhatsApp messages to customers, create payment links, and share their social presence — all from their phone.
highlights: One-tap access to store management, WhatsApp outreach, and payment link generation
Clean, minimal dashboard designed for shop owners who aren't tech-savvy
Multi-language support so retailers can use the app in their preferred language
Social links hub to connect all their online presence in one spot

title: 100 Roses
description: An elegant online flower delivery store based in the UAE. I built a storefront that matches the premium feel of the brand — clean product browsing, easy checkout, and a design that makes you want to send flowers to someone right away.
highlights: Premium storefront with curated rose collections and glass vase combos
Google-rated 4.7 stars — customers love the buying experience
Tabby integration so customers can pay in installments
Fully responsive design that looks just as good on mobile

title: Floral Hub
description: Another flower delivery platform I worked on — Floral Hub focuses on special occasions like Valentine's Day and seasonal collections. The client wanted something warm and inviting, and I think we nailed it.
highlights: Seasonal collection pages for Valentine's Day, tulips, and exclusive bouquets
Clean category navigation that helps customers find exactly what they need
Phone-based ordering support for customers who prefer a personal touch
Warm, pink-toned design that perfectly captures the brand's personality

title: NCD / Wataniya Store
description: The online storefront for NCD (Wataniya) — a major electronics retailer. I built a fully Arabic e-commerce experience with seasonal promotions, category browsing, and a layout that handles a huge product catalog without feeling cluttered.
highlights: RTL Arabic-first design with dynamic Ramadan promotional banners
Well-organized categories — home appliances, TVs, electricals, and more
Integrated customer support hotline (6226) right into the shopping flow
Handles a large product catalog while keeping the browsing experience fast

title: Adhwa Al Aqsa
description: An e-commerce site for a lighting and home decor brand. The client wanted their online presence to feel as trustworthy as their in-store experience, so I built a store that leads with warranty and quality messaging front and center.
highlights: Trust-first branding with warranty and quality guarantee messaging upfront
Arabic RTL layout with clean product categorization
Showcases lighting fixtures, home decor, and smart home solutions
Professional design that bridges the gap between online and in-store shopping

title: Luqaimat & Chebab
description: A food ordering platform for a beloved local dessert brand. Customers can browse the menu, customize toppings, and choose between delivery or pickup — keeping it simple and delicious.
highlights: Delivery and pickup options with a smooth ordering flow
Menu customization — customers can add toppings and pick their favorites
10% discount codes built right into the browsing experience
Brand-matching warm design that feels as cozy as the desserts taste

title: MyNCD (Wataniya)
description: A mobile companion app for NCD/Wataniya — one of the biggest electronics retailers in the region. Customers use it to manage warranty cards, track technician visits, view payment history, and keep their profile up to date. The whole UI is right-to-left Arabic-first.
highlights: Warranty and technician card management — customers can scan and store them digitally
Full payment history with clear paid/unpaid status and easy-to-read breakdowns
RTL Arabic interface that feels natural and polished, not like an afterthought
Direct customer support access with one tap via the 6226 hotline

title: AykaFin
description: AykaFin is a personal finance app I'm really proud of. It helps people take control of their money — track income, expenses, debts, and investments, store important documents, and even manage family finances together. Think of it as your financial life in one place.
highlights: Beautiful dashboard showing net worth, monthly income vs. expenses, and a financial health score
Quick actions to log income, expenses, debts, goals, property, investments, and family entries
Document library to securely store and organize important financial papers
Family finance management with member roles and permission controls
